entry.title: Re: Use inbound service in BAdi to update the purchase or...
entry.content:
Hi Vincent, 

Thanks a lot for your answer. 

I create the communication arrangement using "SAP_COM_0053". And can update the Purchase Order NetPrice Amount using the api link below. 

https://my123456-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV//A_PurchaseOrderItem(PurchaseOrder=' ',PurchaseOrderItem='10'). 

I want to use that one in the logic. But it only has inbound service and in logic I cannot write outbound service.

Best Regards,

Pyae

entry.title: Re: Digital Payments add-on - AR Credit Card Clearing
entry.content: I ran into the same issue and fixed it by checking the payment method config in OBPM1 and making sure the card clearing settings match what's set in the digital payments add-on.

entry.title: Re: External Break-point not triggering for OData
entry.content: Hi Sijin,

entry.title: Re: Calling a SOAP API using Postman
entry.content:
Hi hajime_sugiyama,

 

do you have access to the S/4 system you try to call? If so please run the transaction SRT_LOG or SRT_MONI and have a look on what exactly is not working.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: KPI-Tile missing category after refresh
entry.content: Please check in Custom CDS under Element Properties if your measure aggregrations are set to "Sum". This might solve the issue.

entry.title: Is it possible to autoscale Integration Suite in BTP Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Hi SAP CPI Expert team,

 

Our team is using SAP Integration Suite in the SAP BTP Cloud Foundry environment, and
currently the integration traffic is nearing the tenant's capacity limit; We're exploring options to handle this scalability challenge.
I would like to know if SAP Integration Suite can be automatically scaled to manage increased load. I've seen the previous question here Maximum Number of Messages for SAP Cloud Platform ... - SAP Community where Elijah said dynamic resource autoscaling was on the roadmap. Is this feature now implemented? If not, what are the recommended alternatives for auto-scaling?
 
Best
Joshua

entry.title: Re: External Break-point not triggering for OData
entry.content: Hi Sijin, I happen to have the same issue in my system too. Different than you, I could not find the paramenter in RZ11, I wonder why!

entry.title: Pl Deliver time time option in external service PR not working in work order
entry.content:
Pl Deliver time time option in external service PR not working . 

i am trying understand Pl Deliver time how to activate there is any configuration based on control key . 

When we create an external PR from a work order, there's a field called "Planned Delivery Time". Ideally, we should be able to mention the number of days there, and based on that, the delivery date should be updated in the Purchase requi. 

please help for this looking solution 

ex. today date PR creation date 14.5.2025 , if we enter 4 in PL deliv. time then PR delivery date will update as 18.05.2025

Hello @AmolJadhav 

Check the dump details in ST22.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

Location: KMD Poland office.

Bartek

in S/4 Hana how is it possible to retrieve the user creation for Customer Hierarchy? I don't see any indication of the user neither in VDH1N nor in KNVH table.

Thanks for your reply

entry.title: Re: Country COA for Morocco
entry.content: Hi Jeremy, Thanks for your instruction. I checked your link and Manage Operating Chart of Accounts app that allows to create a worklist to mass upload G/L accounts. However, it is applicable for operating COA only. Is there any way to upload country COA G/L accounts? Thank you.

entry.title: Re: COE_SNAPSHOT_BAD_REQUEST - How to restrict the number of concurrent connections?
entry.content: we are using a remote source connection in HANA, ODATA type to SuccessFactors

entry.title: Re: Tax payable posting to vendor account
entry.content: Hi Jeremy, I contacted SAP support and they said the posting keys cannot be changed. For possible solution, they asked me to raise a question here since this is the requirement, not a bug.

entry.title: Re: How can I copy dimension members between private dimensions in 2 separate models
entry.content: I hope it works for your application. Out of interest, the data export service exposes multiple structures, including master data for all the dimensions, so there is a good chance you could just use the master data for your dimension as the source, create a dummy measure in the transformation, and then load the data to a dummy version. Cheers, Ivan.

entry.title: Re: physical data model using excel import is failing in...
entry.content:
If you don't want the default FK columns, you need to import the Reference Join object, which is owned by the Reference object. According to the Metamodel Objects Help (on the Help menu), you need to supply the ParentTableColumn and the ChildTableColumn for the Join.

I haven't imported PDM Joins from Excel, but I have imported LDM Joins using these properties:

ParentParent AttributeChild Attribute
Grandchild112 --- > Grandchild122This is an AK attGrandchild122.Identifier used in Join

Parent = the name of the Relationship/Reference

Parent Attribute = just the attribute name

Child Attribute = a concatenation of the entity and attribute name

Hope this works

George

entry.title: Re: how to restrict users to post suppliers invoices
entry.content: Dear Team,

entry.title: Re: how to restrict users to post suppliers invoices
entry.content:
Hi Community,

The same process i followed but the post tab is showing.

Let me know how to restrict some users to post option in supplier invoices.

 

Regards
Manasa

entry.title: Re: Your Guide to Free Learning Journeys on SAP Finance
entry.content:
Dear @Doris_Lindauer 

I am currently part of the SAP group as a student and I am using the Student Edition. I am very interested in the SAP S/4HANA Finance – Financial Accounting certification, and I would like to know if it is possible to take this certification as a student with access to the Student Edition.

Could you please let me know if this is feasible and, if so, what the requirements or procedures are?

Thank you in advance for your time and support.

Kind regards,
Fabrice

entry.title: Retrofit for same SID systems between on prem and rise with SAP
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it possible to use retrofit for below system details where SID is same for parallel Devlopment, but hostnames are different.

On-prem Maintenance Landscape: DS4 -> QS4 -> PS1 (solman 7.2, SP 9)

Rise with SAP Upgrade landscape: DS4 -> QS6 -> PS2 (Rise )

SID is same for Devlopment in both on-prem and rise landscapes.

will the retrofit work with same sid but different hostnames.

Kindly help with the retrofit configuration approach on this.

Regards
Saikat

entry.title: Re: Workflow for document post from Reprocess bank statem...
entry.content: Hi Anita, The question is not regarding how to use processing rules, it is about user wants to control the posting to supplier from Reprocess bank statement item app. So normally when making payment in Automatic payment, it will posts Dr supplier / Cr Bank offset. When importing the Bank statement, it will clear Bank offset account if the memo line has sufficient information. In case it cannot clear Bank offset account, user will go to Reprocess bank statement item to pick up the line of Bank offset account to be cleared. However, in Reprocess bank statement item, user may wrongly change Account type to supplier and post to AP account. My client wants to avoid this case, so they ask if there is a control point like workflow if it posts to supplier in Finance (not through Supplier invoice), it will trigger the approval process. Hope it is clear. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: How can I copy dimension members between private dimensions in 2 separate models
entry.content: Out of interest, I am using a similar approach to load a public dimension onto itself. So using the data export service, I have set up a data load job to the public dimension, and I use this to clear a property flag which is set elsewhere in a planning story. The load job itself is added as a step in a multi action which can be added to a story and triggered via scripting. Cheers, Ivan.

entry.title: Why the following action creation of a sales order is not available in service order?
entry.content:
Dear all

I see that in the cloud public the functionality of following action ' creation of a sales order' is not available.

Does this means it is not possible to do it? How can we track the delivery of a tool that is send to the customer before the technical arrive on place to process a service?

Thank you

Ingrid

entry.title: Custom field and logics
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have added a custom field using the "Custom Fields and Logic" app in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud under the Customer: General Information business context. The field is created and published successfully.

Now, I want this custom field to appear in the Customer Master Data Template specifically in the Tax tab. I am unsure about the following:

  1. How do I define the path for this custom field so that it appears in the Tax tab of the Customer Master Data Template?

  2. Do I need to use a different business context ?

  3. Are there any additional steps required to ensure this field is placed in the correct section and has the intended impact?

Best Regards,

Tehreem Fatima

entry.title: Document Grounding Entitlement does not show up in Entitlments
entry.content:
Hi,
 
We are trying to enable the Document Grounding feature for Joule, but when we go to the Joule subaccount in our BTP and try to add the Document Grounding assignment, it does not appear. 
We already confirmed with our Account Executive that we have the necessary AI units 

  • AI Units SKU – 8018592

Any suggestions on how to fix this?

Joule

entry.title: Re: I want a cr to run with the export option as data onl...
entry.content:
Need more info...

What version of CR are you using?

When you say run automatically can you explain more?

When designing reports you can set the default to some extend, open the report and:

then:

Select one of the Data Only options and select the defaults you want to use:

Now save the Report, next time it should use those values.

If you are using B1, CRS or BOE Servers your Admin can set the defaults for you when scheduling.

entry.title: Re: Responsibility Management: Create Your Rules (5/5)
entry.content:
Hello,

@ranjeetkumar07 , @Gaayathri Could there be a mistake in the print screen of the Responsibilty Rule ?

Parameter YY1_PURCHASECONTRACT CDS View field assignment should be the contract number not the created by user.

entry.title: Re: S4 HANA Cost Center Activity Rate Calculation Hybrid Approach
entry.content:
Thank you  Surajit233 for the very useful and clear approach in this very important matter.

Only one advise when it comes to the use of Universal Allocation app.... if we use it for overhead plan cost center allocation in ACDOCP table, the program R_FINS_PLAN_TRANS_CO_S4H_2_ERP (CO Activity Independent Data Transfer) aren't able to transfer of cost element 42 category, so, the result of cost center allocation is not transferred to CO classical tables, which make this very nice tool useless in this context.

So, we both need to use a Universal Allocation app with "Distribution" type, instead of "Overhead allocation" or we have to first transfer the direct cost center plan and then use the classical t-codes for overhead cost center allocation (KSUB, etc). I can't see other ways to handle the situation when we need to performe cost center allocations and costing rates calc.

Any insights are welcome!

 

Regards,

entry.title: How to add authorization chceck on custom uibb searchhelp in MDGC.
entry.content:
How to add authorization chceck on custom uibb searchhelp in MDGC.
After clicking search .

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Best approach to define corporate colors in crystal r...
entry.content:
Hit the F1 key to bring up CR's help file and then search for "custom chart colors"

See if that provides info on how to, possibly it can be used to find the original selections they used.

entry.title: Re: How to redeem a campaign code to get a free SAP Certification exam attempt and schedule your exa
entry.content:

Where can we get the campaign code?

I'm looking for to take SAP Finance Certification

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: How to make field with asterisk mandatory MDGC
entry.content:
Hello .

There is a field ( payment terms ) it is ( should be mandatory ) on step 4 of CR Create as well as on step 4 CR Change.
It i smandatory in Create but not in Change.
I went through all the configs and dev and I can see no difference, but the behavior is different.
in Creation message appears MDGBP155 "Enter a value for field &1"

in Change - no.

 

Thank you.

entry.title: BW: Delete content from Write Optimized DSO in Chain
entry.content:
Hi.
We need to delete all request from a WO DSO (BW 7.5) in a Process Chain.
We tried with Complete Deletion of Data Targent Contents getting errors (why?): 

We also cannot use Deletion of Request from Write-Optimized DSO (classic) because we need to delete all content regardless of the date (Older Than should be 0, by system doesn't allow values less than 1).

Thanks in advance,
Luis.

entry.title: Improving 404 Page Not Found
entry.content:
Currently the Page 'not found error message' (screenprint attached) doesn't provide sufficient information on how the user can rectify the situation and leads to a negative UX e.g. information providing further support by way of links to homepage is missing; the opportunity to report the broken link is missing and support contact numbers are absent.

This can be achieved by empowering customers to configure the page so that they can tailor it to enable the onward journey for the user and providing more helpful information.

Please cast your vote

Kind Regards

Saif Alvi

entry.title: Re: Output Management in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello @Markus_Berg ,

are there any updates on this (https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blog-posts-by-sap/output-management-in-sap-s-4hana/bc-p/13492540/highlight/true#M40286

"According to my knowledge, SAP has a clear maintenance strategy for the java-based ADS until 2030. SAP also evaluates options for beyond this point to keep up to the promise that SAP S/4HANA will be maintained until 2040 including all released capabilities (e.g. forms).

In addition, SAP offers the ADS as a cloud-service (SAP Forms service by Adobe) which has no dedicated end of maintenance."

As I understand there are options to generate Adobe Forms on S/4 Hana (on prem) after java-based ADS is retired in 2027 - are there information available about limitations and/or licesing? The cloud service is payed by pages - but what about on-prem/private cloud if java-stack is not available any more?

Best regards,
Michael

entry.title: Planned independent requirement (PIR) reduction not occurring (consumption working correctly)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to create a PIR type that is consumed by all demand elements (The PIR is to be loaded out of IBP).  I reviewed SAP notes 772856 and 772857 and created a new requirements class with a planning indicator of 1, a consumption indicator of 3 and a requirements category of 1.  I created a new requirements type tied to the class.  In addition I set the material master mixed MRP flag to 1.  I have consumption mode set to backwards then forwards (with values set for period).  The new requirements type consumes correctly with STO, production and sales order demand all consuming the PIR, however if I were to issue to production demand via a 261 movement, the PIR is not reduced.  I have tried with a Strategy group of 11, 40, 70 and 74 (in MRP 3 on material master) none work.  I also added my new requirements class to OMP4 and flagged History.  The movement type 261 is flagged for independent requirement reduction in OMJJ.  I would want dispatching to an STO or sales order also to reduce the PIR if possible, but I am currently testing with issue to a process order.

Any ideas as to what I am missing or doing wrong?  Am I asking for the impossible?  The scenario is that we define a schedule in IBP and pass to SAP and use it to plan against, however if real demand exceeds the PIRs then we will increase the plan.

Any help would be appreciated,

Thanks,

Jez

entry.title: Re: Connect with SAP Community at SAP Sapphire and Share Your Special SAP Event Moment!
entry.content:
Hello dear BIFers!

I saw how fun it is to interact with old friends that I made through BIF so I want to invite all of you to say Hi, share how you are doing and upload an image of a memorable SAP Event moment you had:

entry.title: Re: How to set up a JDBC Connection using the Cloud Connector
entry.content:
Hi @artioms, I'm trying to connect to an AS400 database like yours, and I can't find a way to establish the JDBC connection via the Socket 5 required by SAP. Could you guide me through the process you followed?
I understand this post is many years old, but it would be very helpful.
Thanks!

entry.title: How to fetch Direct Reports details of a Manager in a Custom MDF object.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Can we able to list down the direct reports of a manager in a custom mdf object?  If yes, how can we achieve this? 

Business Requirement.

Customer requires a custom portlet which should display all the direct reportees custom-field information. This gives the manager an overview of employee's custom information collectively in a single portlet. 

Field reference below.

Employee 1 (user id)  --> Employee Name --> Custom record.

Employee 2 (user id) --> Employee Name --> Custom record.

Please let me know if this is possible and also share any reference KBA or a blog if available.

Regards, Shadeesh

HI Bheemesh,

Thanks for the explanation. What will the behavior of existing running Replication Flow if I am renaming the target folder on ADLS Gen2? Will its still work without any issue or it needs to be redeployed with correct target name?

Thanks.

Nilay

entry.title: Re: How to Add a Dynamic Custom Section with Custom Fields to the "Manage Sales Orders - Versio
entry.content:

But when I try to generate ABAP repository objects for C_SALESORDERMANAGE, it shows: "No generator available for the selected object.

entry.title: Re: Remove the permission to Insert New Record via histor...
entry.content:
@angelosuano - Yes, it is absolutely possible to grant pencil rights without allowing the insert option. We follow a similar approach at my company.

To achieve this, you’ll need to update the permission roles for each relevant portlet by setting the "Actions" under Employee Central Effective Dated Entities to View Current and View History only. This configuration allows users to view and edit existing entries without being able to insert new ones.

Below is a screenshot to reference.

entry.title: Cash management: Liquidity Forecast. Unify cash flow (account assignment) items.
entry.content:
In the cash flow analyzer app, when we analyze the liquidity forecast we see that from one vendor item we have 3 different cash flows. When you navigate from any of these 3 cash flows it directs you to the same cash flow item. The 3 different amounts are account assignments. We want to deactivate this so that the cash flow analyzer app only shows one cash flow per document item.

See the below example (Image 1). In the cash flow analyzer app we see the below 3 account assignments as 3 different flows, but our requiremet is to only show the total amount as one visible flow in the cash flow analyzer app (see image 2, we want the vendor item amount).

 

We know we can modify this manually with the "Check cash flow items" app, however we want it to be done automatically.

Our client's system is S4HANA ON PREMISE (2021).

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration - Getting the Error 'FAILED to start bundle from path:' when deploying iFlow
entry.content: I'm facing the same issue & couldn't solve the issue. I don't know what is the reason behind the issue.

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration - Getting the Error 'FAILED to start bundle from path:' when deploying iFlow
entry.content: I'm facing the same issue & couldn't solve the issue. I don't know what is the reason behind the issue. Can someone help me to solve the issue?

entry.title: How to split or defer vendor invoice lines if expense covers multiple periods
entry.content:
Hi,

Can you split Vendor invoice lines automatically to different periods in SAP?
For example can you split insurance invoice line for a year automatically to periods (1/12 to Expense every month).
Accrual engine seems to be there, but quickly checking only below sources listed.

  • manual
  • purchase orders
  • service entry sheets

So can you do the same for Supplier invoice lines?

entry.title: Re: Can SAP Integration Suite Push Data to S/4HANA On-Premise via JDBC Adapter?
entry.content: At no point should a direct update via JDBC be explored... there's a reason that there is an application layer sitting on top of the database.

entry.title: Re: How to Add a Dynamic Custom Section with Custom Fields to the "Manage Sales Orders - Versio
entry.content:
Hi @bhargavd1 ,
Have you opened the "Generate ABAP Repository Objects" for the data definion c_salesordermanage? There are multiple (6) objects named c_salesordermanage. Please send more details and a screenshot for further analysis.

entry.title: Re: Abap trial service key not working in eclipse
entry.content: I think the updates on how to login are misleading. I opened the service key and copied the main URL right on the top. Pushed that into the Eclipse ABAP Cloud Project URL and selected the logon on any browser option. I opened an Incognito window and pasted that URL, which opened the default SAP logon window and proceeded with the authentication...hope this works for you too...sorry did not get an option to share screenshots

entry.title: Re: CAP application not working with HANA Cloud DB after deployment
entry.content: @SSaiSathosh_IBM I created the project few days earlier than 6th April and complete CRUD was working but started facing this error from 6th or 7th April.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to get access to a GTS learning system?
entry.content:
You can buy a license for the SAP Learning Hub.
Then you have access to practice systems, e.g. SAP GTS.

entry.title: Re: Finding the right CDS Extractor in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Muchas gracias por la información Frank!!

Super útil todo lo que explicas 🔝

Un saludo.

entry.title: SAP Service and Asset Manager 2405-Technicians fetch the data for multiple company codes and plants
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

We are in advanced stage of SAP Service and Asset Manager 2405 application. We were asked to implement the following task in SSAM 2405. The expectation is "Field Technicians should fetch the data across the multiple plants and multiple company codes". I referred the SAP Community and KBAs and I understood this feature is part of SSAM 2410 application which is not available in SSAM 2405 and needs customization for this. However I would like to know the feasibility to achieve the expectation especially for "Fetching the data across the multiple company codes". Is this possible technically and functional wise? I referred the SAP Note 3491448, it is not mentioned about the company codes and mentioned about only plants and work centers and other parameters. Please let me know if this is something feasible for multiple company codes.

 

Thanks and Regards

Pavan

 

SAP Service and Asset Manager

entry.title: Re: Data migration Practice systems
entry.content:
Hello,

 

You can test SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit using a CAL instance. Please check this blog for more information: SAP S/4HANA Fully-Activated Appliance: Demo Guides. Review the section "Data Migration & Migration Cockpit"

 

Regards,

Jose M.

entry.title: Agentic AI Evaluation: Observability, Traceability & Metrics That Matter
entry.content:
Introduction

Today, enterprises are creating agents, either to automate some manual processes or to optimize existing once. No matter what is the use case, we have already entered the Economy of Agents. This is similar to last several decades where software engineers, developers or consultants developed production grade applications.

Software development evolved over decades which gave us some time to adapt to it and accept new solutions/frameworks. Also the pace with which we were developing applications was slow as compared to the pace with which agentic solutions are being developed.

The critical difference between traditional software solutions/applications and agentic solutions is the very nature. Traditional software solutions are deterministic in nature as opposed to agentic solutions which are non deterministic in nature to an extent.

Quality Gate for traditional software development has evolved over years of iterations and given us some robust test automation tools and frameworks. The harsh truth is - we still find production bugs.

Now, imagine a non deterministic agentic software application for which testing is hard to define or predict at times. This may lead to totally unpredictable production bugs or unexpected behaviour. This might cost us time and money, that too - exponentially.

That is the reason, evaluation of Agentic solutions is very important and should be considered top priority for enterprises to ensure we produce good quality of Agentic applications.

This blog is not to scare you, but to give you a spark to think and act.

So, gear up! and let's start 🚀

I will breakdown the article into following parts

  1. What is agent evaluation?
  2. Types of agent evaluation
  3. Evaluation Tools
  4. Evaluation framework (Block Diagram)
  5. Why OpenTelemetry?
  6. Code walkthrough
  7. Available Agentic Evaluation frameworks

What is Agent Evaluation?

Agent evaluation is validating the output of an agent. This differs slightly from the typical software development testing. In a software testing, we know what is a input and what is the expected output.

But in case of agentic solutions, as the response is given by the underlying LLM, the output varies due to lot of factors such as prompts, LLM used etc.

So, agentic AI testing is done in a different way. It is based on some pre-defined metrics such as response times, underlying tools used by the agent, token consumption, cost of total response etc. to name a few.

Based on the evaluation results, the respective developer can tweak the solution either by enhancing the prompts, changing the underlying LLM, introducing additional tool which will reduce the over all response time and token consumption, but also ensuring the expected output is provided.

Agent evaluation is a evolving space and a lot of advancements are being done to streamline it.

Types of Agent Evaluation

  1. Code based evaluation: It is a pro-code type of evaluation and you will get a glimpse of it in this tutorial/POC. In code based evaluation, code is injected in the Agentic AI application which captures the metric data when the agent it executing any request. It is well suited to validate objectivity of the solution. By that, I mean it is well suited to validate the quantitative attributes of the agentic solution, for example - latency, response time, token consumption etc.
  2. LLM as a judge: This is kind of low-code type of evaluation. This is not covered in this tutorial/POC. As the name suggests, here LLM is a reviewer. It validates the correctness of the output provided by the agentic application. It is well suited to validate subjectivity of the solution. By that, I mean it is well suited to validate the qualitative attributes of the agentic solution, for example - correctness of output response, reasoning, planning etc.

Evaluation Tools

Pre-requisite: For running this observability stack on your local machine, you should have docker desktop installed. Once done, install below docker images.
  1. Prometheus: Time series data store for collecting metric data and alerting.
  2. Grafana Tempo: A distributed tracing backend that simplifies storing and visualizing trace data.
  3. OpenTelemetry Collector: Acts as a central hub for receiving traces and exporting telemetry data to observability backends.
  4. Grafana: Grafana is an interactive data visualization and monitoring platform that allows users to query, visualize, and understand data from various source.

Evaluation Framework (Block Diagram)

Figure-1

 

Why OpenTelemetry?

A very obvious question after looking at the above block diagram is "Why OpenTelemetry?"

OpenTelemetry is an open standard for collecting and exporting telemetry data like metrics and traces.

I would summarize in 5 important points:

  1. Vendor neutral and can integrate with any backend for visualization
  2. Provides diverse language support (Python, Node.js etc)
  3. Batch processing which helps to speed up the trace collection
  4. Provides standard format for collection of observability data
  5. Powerful tracing providing parent-child relationship and context propagation

If you want to deep dive into open telemetry, I have added a link in the reference section.

Code Walkthrough

Till now we have discussed the theory and block diagram, now it's time to deep dive in the code. The Agent Evaluation section of the README details out each and every step to help you get started. I would like to mention some important files in this section for you to give extra attention when you are browsing the code

  1. observability folder has all the config files for open telemetry collector, tempo and prometheus.
  2. agent_observability.py - This singleton class is the core of observability. This holds all the methods for capturing the metrics and traces. I have created decorators which are applied on the actual functions to capture traces. Custom attributes like request_size_in_bytes, agent_name, response_time are captured. You can add more attributes here such as token_consumption etc.
  3. agent_service.py - In this file, you will see the decorator applied to the "/chat" endpoint method.
  4. weather_functions.py - In this file, you will see the decorator applied to all the weather functions.

I have applied the tracing only to weather agent, but can be extended to finance agent.

But there are over the shelf evaluation frameworks available which can be leveraged and provide certain level of customizations. The next section talks about it.

Available Agentic Evaluation Frameworks

I have listed few agentic AI evaluations frameworks available and are good starting point to start learning and understanding the importance of agent evaluation.

  1. LangSmith - https://www.langchain.com/langsmith 
  2. Phoenix - https://docs.arize.com/phoenix
  3. DeepEval - https://www.deepeval.com 

Conclusion

Drawing from my experience, I must emphasize that these insights can serve as a starting point, though their applicability may vary based on specific scenarios. This project will surely give you a starting point from design and development of Agentic AI evaluation.

Along with the theory, my intention is to showcase a fully functional prototype which is publicly available on - GitHub

Disclaimer: This is not an official reference application or documentation. The thoughts outlined in this blog are based on my experience and learnings about Agentic AI and agent evaluation.

Feel free to “like“, “Share“, “Add a Comment” and to get more updates about my next blogs follow me!

References

  1. https://opentelemetry.io/docs/languages/python/ 
  2. https://grafana.com/blog/2021/05/04/get-started-with-distributed-tracing-and-grafana-tempo-using-foobar-a-demo-written-in-python/ 
  3. https://prometheus.io/ 
  4. https://opentelemetry.io/docs/what-is-opentelemetry/

entry.title: Re: HTTP Service not displayed in ABAP Development Tools (ADT): "httpEndpointUri" is null
entry.content:
1. I think, you should create a question not a discussion. Because I never created one of these I don't know how to make the difference.

2. Try transaction SICF in SAPGui. Under default_host follow the URL path to your service. Using context menu (right mouse button) at the service name you can activate or deactivate the service. Maybe that's what you need.

entry.title: Re: Can SAP Integration Suite Push Data to S/4HANA On-Pre...
entry.content:
Why would you do this?  First, S/4 HANA has much better integration options with SAP IS through the ABAP layer.  Second, direct DB updates could cause data inconsistency.  Third (and possibly most important), direct DB updates might be a violation of your license with SAP.  You’ll need to check your own contract.

 

That said, in theory it’s possible.  There is a HANA JDBC driver.  But you shouldn’t do it though, it’s a very bad idea.

entry.title: Define Account Determination for Bank Clearing Accounts subaccount grayed out
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

In CBC activity Define Account Determination for Bank Clearing Accounts I enter the subaccount but after saving it's grayed out. 

I found this KBA Note https://me.sap.com/notes/3312572 but it's note useful. 

KBA Note: 

Configuration steps:

In Configuration Activity 101024 'Make Global Settings for Electronic Bank Statement' assign bank subaccount to an account symbol.

 

In Configuration Activity 103557 'Assign Account Symbol to Payment Methods' assign payment method to account symbol and country/region key.

What could be the problem?

Both settings are fine in my understandings and yet when I try to enter save the subaccounts it's still grayed out -->

Thank you in advance!

Jyoti

entry.title: Re: Business Role Groups & Business User Groups
entry.content: Hi @kavya11, i think my comment from one week ago can be considered the correct answer. In short: there is no logic connected to those two groups and no actions are possible. They are just replacements for former BRGRU-type groups which are used in authorization values.

entry.title: Re: AI units license in Sales Demo for SuccessFactors Rec...
entry.content:
Hi @JudithD ,

Yes, it is possible to acquire the SAP AI Units license for a Sales Demo (SFCPART) environment; however, there are specific considerations and limitations to be aware of.

1. Availability of AI Units License for Sales Demo
SAP SuccessFactors does not provide support for free trial or demo instances, including SalesDemo environments. According to SAP Knowledge Base Article 2457731, SAP SuccessFactors Cloud Support does not assist with free trial demo instances or SalesDemo environments. For more details, you should contact your SAP Partner Account Manage

2. Prerequisites for "Generating Interview Questions" Feature

To utilize the "Generating Interview Questions" feature in SuccessFactors Recruiting with Microsoft Teams integration, the following prerequisites must be met:

SAP AI Units License: Ensure that the SAP AI Units license has been purchased. For more information about the license, contact your Account Executive.

Enable AI-Assisted HCM Content Generator: This option must be enabled in Provisioning.


3. Considerations for Sales Demo Environments
While it is technically possible to acquire the SAP AI Units license for a Sales Demo environment, it's important to note that:

Limited Support: SAP does not provide support for Sales Demo environments, as mentioned earlier.

Feature Availability: Some features may not be fully functional or may have limitations in demo environments.

Licensing Restrictions: Ensure that the licensing terms for the SAP AI Units allow usage in a demo environment.

For a fully supported and fully functional environment, it is recommended to implement the necessary configurations in a production or sandbox environment where SAP provides full support and where all features can be fully tested.

4. Next Steps
Contact SAP Partner Account Manager: Discuss the possibility of acquiring the SAP AI Units license for your Sales Demo environment and clarify any licensing restrictions.


Review Licensing Terms: Ensure that the licensing terms for the SAP AI Units permit usage in a demo environment.

Test in a Supported Environment: If possible, test the "Generating Interview Questions" feature in a supported production or sandbox environment to ensure full functionality.

If you need further assistance with the configuration or have other questions, feel free to ask.

Hope this helps!!

Thanks,

kr,

karthick.

entry.title: Re: Can SAP Integration Suite Push Data to S/4HANA On-Pre...
entry.content: Kudos to your more thorough response... 😉

entry.title: managed rap + unmanged save and bapi getting success message + error site
entry.content:
Hi all,

hope you have a idea for my issue in my onPrem system. I create a managed rap business object displaying a maintenance order with operations and confirmations. For creating my confirmations I use a bapi (create maintenance confirmation with internal numbering). I embed the bapi in my handler class for unmanaged saving.

Using my generated fiori elements web site for creating a confirmation I get a success message and additional a error message (requested data wasn't found). In my console I see that my site made a get request with the maintenance order + operation but the key of the previous created confirmation are empty. 

How can I tell the system the key's of the created entity, so that the get method is processed correctly? 
Last week I made the course s4d437 and there the trainer told me to use late numbering, but how? The bapi manage the keys by itself. 

Does any one have a idea?

Thanks and regards
Bernd

entry.title: Automatically assign a source of supply when changing a preq
entry.content:
In ME52N, if I change the plant on an item then the source of supply data gets blanked out and I have to click "Assign source of supply" for it to be populated. Is there a way to make the system automatically populate it on change of plant?

I'm looking to mass change the plant on thousands of requisitions but currently this is a two step process, one to change the plant and then another to assign source of supply.

entry.title: Step by Step Process to de-kit an assembly with BOM or previous Production Order
entry.content: Not new but new to this process. Looking for a step by step process on how to take an assembly and de-kit it. Non-EWM. Want to be able to create a de-kit production order with no OH only materials. Want to be able to enter a previously closed Production Order or BOM to identify all the components to be reversed. Read a few online suggestions but they didn't have enough information for us to attempt this in our Dev system. Any and all help will be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Alternative to ME28 PO Release Report
entry.content: Use ME29

entry.title: Re: Future dated onboardees cannot be searched via Inacti...
entry.content:
Hi @kumariaayushi ,

This is a known behavior in SAP SuccessFactors where future-dated hires (onboardees with a hire date in the future) are considered external users or inactive, and the way they appear in search depends on multiple configuration settings—particularly around Search Settings, Role-Based Permissions (RBP), and Company & Logo Settings.

Explanation of Current Behavior:

When "Hide External Users from Search Results" is checked:

Future-dated onboardees are hidden from global search (as expected).

However, they also do not appear in the Inactive Search in Employee File due to their status as external users or because of insufficient RBP configuration.

When it's unchecked:

Future-dated hires appear in both global search and inactive search — which is not what you want.

Solution Strategy:
There is no out-of-the-box switch to limit visibility to only Inactive Search while hiding users from the global header. However, here’s how you can achieve your desired outcome through a combination of RBP configuration and smart search settings.

Just try below Configuration Steps:

1. Keep "Hide External Users from Search Results" ENABLED
This will prevent future-dated hires from showing in the Global Search Header.

2. Configure Role-Based Permissions (RBP) for Inactive Employee Access
Make sure the users (e.g., HR or Admins) who need to search for future-dated hires have permissions to view Inactive Users in the Employee Profile.

Go to Admin Center > Manage Permission Roles.

Select the relevant permission role (e.g., HR, Recruiter).

Under User Permissions > Employee Data, enable:

"View Inactive User Profile"

Under General User Permissions, enable:

"Search Inactive Employees"

This allows users with this role to use the Inactive Search in Employee Files without exposing these users to global search.

3. Use Employee File > Inactive Search as Standard Process
Train users to always use Employee File > Inactive Search when looking up future-dated hires. This avoids the Global Search entirely.

Note:

There is currently no way to split the visibility so that:

Future-dated hires are only visible in Inactive Search

And not in Global Search, while still being classified as “internal” users

The behavior is either show in all or hide from all depending on the external user flag and the global setting.

Hope this clarifies your query.

Thanks,

kr,

karthick.

entry.title: Re: Is ME28 transaction Obsolete?
entry.content: Use ME29.

entry.title: SAP Screen Personas MOBGui Labels translation
entry.content: In SAP Screen Personas MOBGui, we have changed label text like from "Rsrc" to "Resource". But when we login to the MOBgui in Spanish Language, the Labels still show as "Resource", they dont get translated. Although in ITS they show the translation from "Rsrc" to its corresponding spanish text. Is there a way we could translate the changed Label text to Spanish text in MOBgui?  We are in Personas 3.0 SP18.

entry.title: Re: CAP application not working with HANA Cloud DB after...
entry.content:
It seems the issue was introduced with 1.9 version of '@cap-js/hana' package. When I switched to 1.8.1 version of it, the issue if fixed.

Reference: https://github.com/cap-js/cds-dbs/issues/1169

FYI: @SSaiSanthosh_IBM @SSaiSanthosh

entry.title: Re: Where can managers see SF182 external learnings of em...
entry.content:
Hello,

I would also like clarification of where managers can see their direct reports external learning requests. In addition, is there a place for an administrator to review requests after they have approved/denied them? I know that approvers see pending approvals in the "Approvals" tab of the activity drop down, but once they approve or deny the request, it is removed from that view. In my organization, there are times that approvers need to revisit a request in the event a user has a question about their request. Outside of running a report or looking at pending approvals on the approvals tab, can approvers and managers see requests regardless of status?

entry.title: After connection test is successful you are getting an error from the SAP Cloud Print manager
entry.content:
After you did the connection Test successfully with the runtime system and the SAP Cloud Print Manager you are getting an error (As shown in the screenshot).

The error is an access denied error from windows denying the write access of the xml config file.

 

To solve this ensure the service (Windows User) who started the SAP Cloud Print Service has Administrator Authorizations and not standard Windows authorization.

You can change-check this in the control panel>Users and check the Windows user authorization in question.

entry.title: Re: CAP application not working with HANA Cloud DB after...
entry.content: The HANA Cloud instance was already on the latest version available (2025.2.12). However, the solution for now is to downgrade the @cap-js/hana package to 1.8.1.

entry.title: Re: Custom events trigger from S/4 Hana to SAP BTP Event Mesh
entry.content:
Hello @BramhaniG 

It just to check Condition values from Event container fields. you can debug and check fields and values in "input Parameter", Test it by adding a workflow user breakpoint and run the process.

entry.title: Querying historical assignment information using Query API
entry.content:
Use Case: We aim to capture the timestamps of when an order was created in FSM and its initial assignment by a dispatcher. Currently, the ServiceAssignment DTO retains only the most recent assignment. Consequently, if an order is reassigned, the initial assignment details are no longer available. As a result, the dispatcher goes to each activity individually and looks at the history to find out when the order was first assigned.

Is there a way to query historical assignment using the Query API? 

Additionally, where do the FSM Service Call/Activity history tabs source their historical information from?

entry.title: Re: External Learning Request - Notification for confirma...

Does this include the user? In other words, once the date of the external learning request has passed, will the user get a notification that they need to go in and verify attendance?

entry.title: ABAP Program shows a Screen which calls a Function which call another screen
entry.content:
Hi,

I wrote a program which shows a screen.

I calls a function which shows its own screen.

When LEAVE TO SCREEN 0 is executes in the function the screen of the program is not shown again.

***

Program:

CALL SCREEN 0100

In PAI: CALL FUNCTION 'XXX'

Function 'XXX'

CALL SCREEN 0101

In PAI: LEAVE TO SCREEN 0

It returns to programa but the screen 0100 is not shown.

SAP TechEd 2019

It covers the addition of the new element, configuration notes, and role-based permission requirements along with links to further documentation you might find useful.

When should we expect the addition of the new metrics? Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Introducing "Ask Anything" Segment at SAP CHOTA Talks Hyderabad 2025 Q2
entry.content:
Breaking New Ground in Community Knowledge Sharing

The SAP Community Hyderabad is thrilled to announce an exciting addition to our
signature SAP CHOTA Talks event series for 2025: the "Ask Anything" segment.
This innovative format will bring unprecedented access to expert knowledge while
maintaining the "CHOTA" (small but mighty) spirit that has made our talks a
community favourite.

The Power of Direct Expert Access

As our community has grown, we have observed a clear pattern in post-event
feedback: participants value the Q&A portions of our sessions just as much as the
prepared content. The spontaneous, unscripted exchanges often yield the most
practical insights and address the specific challenges our community members face
in their day-to-day work with SAP technologies.
The "Ask Anything" segment transforms this valuable but often rushed part of
traditional events into a central, carefully designed feature of SAP CHOTA Talks
Hyderabad 2025.

How "Ask Anything" Works

Expert Panel Composition

Each "Ask Anything" session will feature four distinguished experts representing core
domains within the SAP ecosystem, (Topics will change based on the community
interest )

Streamlined Format

The "Ask Anything" segment embraces the CHOTA philosophy of maximum value in
minimum time:

 

Participant Experience

Attendees will enjoy several unique aspects of this format:

  • Domain Indicators: Color-coded question cards help organize questions by
    domain
  • Question Preparation Area: A dedicated space where participants can refine
    their questions with the help of community moderators before the session

Why This Format Works

The "Ask Anything" segment addresses several challenges common to traditional
panel discussions:
1. Eliminates Monopolization: By strictly timing both questions and answers,
no single topic dominates the session
2. Ensures Relevance: Questions come directly from participants dealing with
real-world SAP challenges
3. Maximizes Expert Utilization: Four experts are simultaneously available,
offering diverse perspectives
4. Creates Engagement: The rapid pace and direct access maintain high
energy and attention levels
5. Reflects Real Work: The format mimics the need to quickly explain
challenges and implement solutions in professional settings

Join Us in Reshaping Community Knowledge Exchange

The "Ask Anything" segment represents our commitment to the SAP Community
Hyderabad's core values of "Learning, Sharing, Networking & Empowering". By
creating this structured yet dynamic format for knowledge exchange, we are taking
another step toward building the most engaged and knowledgeable SAP community
in the region.
Mark your calendars for the inaugural "Ask Anything" session at SAP CHOTA Talks
Hyderabad in January 2025. Registration opens November 2024 through our
community portal, with priority access for active community contributors.

Get Involved

Interested in serving as a panelist? Have suggestions for specific domains you would like
to see represented? Want to help organize or moderate these sessions?
Contact our Community team at sapinsidetrackhyderabad@gmai.com.
Together, lets make SAP knowledge more accessible, practical, and community-
driven than ever before!

entry.title: how to stop creation of new positions from every change in job information

every change we do in job information portlets leads to creation of new positions.

Example : I have change the manager of the Employee, however it creates new position in the system and employee is now on the the new position.

It is creating unnecessary positions in the system.

Please help.
